prompt: Create a polished anime-style vertical illustration of a young woman standing on a beach at sunset, waist-up to upper-thigh framing, centered slightly right. She has long glossy black hair flowing dramatically left in the sea breeze, with bright rim highlights from the sunset. Her face should be intentionally obscured by a plain centered square censor block in a warm brown skin-tone color, covering the eyes, nose, and mouth area. She wears a loose white short-sleeve T-shirt with realistic folds, warm orange shadow reflections, and a slightly sheer sunlit fabric effect, plus high-waisted olive green jeans with belt loops, pockets, metal button, and exactly 2 small ripped patches, one on each thigh. Add delicate gold jewelry: exactly 2 visible pieces, a thin necklace with a small round pendant and one dangling earring on the visible ear. Background: a romantic twilight seaside scene with wet sand, foamy waves rolling in from the right, glowing orange-gold reflections on the water, the sun low near the horizon on the right, scattered peach and purple clouds, distant mountains on the left, a coastal town with tiny warm lights along the shore, and a small lighthouse silhouette on a headland near the sun. Use cinematic golden-hour lighting, high detail, crisp anime rendering, painterly highlights, soft atmospheric depth, and a warm orange-pink-purple color palette. Include a white cursive artist signature reading @kanata in the bottom-left corner. Vertical 2:3 composition, no extra characters, no additional text, no border.
